prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2023–2025年位次稳定在2.78万附近、2026年大幅扩招（+9人/+13%）使竞争明显缓解、物理类热门工科专业热度持续偏高等因素；预测2026年物理类最低位次约30078名，区间29578–30578名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 12631 → 42788 (abnormal gap) → 26321 → 27901 → 27821; excluding the 2022 anomaly, the 2023–2025 range stabilized at 26321–27921, with a 2025 baseline of approximately 27821; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 50 in 2021, 63 in 2022, 59 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 69 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 78, an increase of 9 (+13%) from 2025, significantly easing competition due to expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable range of 46–58 in recent years; the 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive (an 81-year-old doctoral graduate with multiple degrees); Douyin popularity is average (overall rank 89); no abnormal admission records; has 5 A- or above disciplines: Education A+, Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, and Marxist Theory A-.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Computer Science was rated 'Recommended' in 2024, Electronic Information/Communication as 'High Heat Recommended', Electrical Engineering as 'High Heat Recommended', and popular engineering majors in Physics Category are generally high in heat; the total number of Gaokao takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 609,800, with Physics Category candidates estimated at about 365,000, a slight increase of about 0.45% from 2025.
7. [Regional Factor] Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and recruits across provinces in Hebei; the number of Physics Category admissions has been increasing in recent years (50→63→59→59→69→78), reflecting the university's emphasis on Hebei Physics Category students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stable ranking around 27,800 in 2023–2025, the significant expansion in 2026 (+9 people/+13%) easing competition, and the sustained high popularity of popular engineering majors in Physics Category; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 30,078, with a range of 29,578–30,578.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1914 → 2130 → 2986 → 2531 → 3051, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 900 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 3051; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 24 in 2021, 29 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 26 in 2024, and 34 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 37, an increase of 3 (+8.8%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion that eases competition somewhat.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively positive (an 81-year-old doctoral graduate earned multiple degrees, demonstrating lifelong learning spirit); Douyin popularity is average (ranked 89th overall), with no clear signs of increased application attention; no abnormal filing records; Education A+ (flagship discipline), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with outstanding strength in teacher-training disciplines; Central China Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it is approximately 53rd, with recent rankings fluctuating between 46 and 58, overall stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of teacher-training/education majors was assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see,' a slight cooling compared to 2023 (63.81); the total number of Gaokao takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025, with History Category examinees estimated at about 245,000, and the competitive environment is basically stable; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 3%-4% (a total of about 103 students in History and Physics categories in 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion in 2026 (+3 students) easing competition somewhat, a slight increase in total examinees, and a relatively positive reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3228, with a range of 2728–3728.
